record.field: ${('' if object.partner_id.email and object.partner_id.email == object.email else object.email) | safe}
${object.partner_id.id if object.partner_id.email and object.partner_id.email == object.email else False}

field.name: body_html
field.div:
Hello ${object.common_name},
We regret to inform you that the following meeting has been cancelled:
Meeting: ${object.event_id.name} % if not object.event_id.allday:
Time: ${object.event_id.get_display_time_tz(tz=object.partner_id.tz)} % endif % if object.event_id.location:
Location: ${object.event_id.location} % endif
Attendees:
% for attendee in object.event_id.attendee_ids: % if attendee.state != 'declined':
${attendee.common_name} % endif % endfor
Thank you for your understanding. % if user.signature:
${user.signature | safe} % endif
